title: Section 30
content: If requisitions for the surrender of a fugitive criminal are received from more than one foreign State 1 ***, the Central Government may, having regard to the circumstances of the case, surrender the fugitive criminal to such State or country as that Government thinks fit
footnote: 1. The words "or commonwealth country or from any foreign State and any commonwealth country" omitted by s. 15, ibid. (w.e.f 18-12-1993).
